summary: All previous blockers resolved. PRs #869, #870 merged. Stale PR #953 closed (all work already on main, had merge conflicts). Security fix #924 (null byte bypass) shipped via PR #952. Denial-retry-escalation invariant #908 implemented and closed. Sprint focus is now solely #955 (wire Go kernel into npm hook path — 100x latency win). No P0/P1 issues in tracker. 0 open squad PRs. PR budget fully available for #955 work.

escalationRules.notes: No failing CI. All guards pass. Clean slate for sprint #955.

feat: Go kernel rewrite + 9-squad swarm org

sprintFocus.title: Wire Go kernel into npm hook path
sprintFocus.notes: Go binary ships via postinstall but hooks still evaluate through TS at 290ms. Must wire claude-hook.ts to delegate to Go binary for 2-3ms evaluation.
